title: To My Strongest Support ❤️
author: Your Annoying Little Brother
message: There are many moments I'll never forget, but one that will stay with me forever is when my hand was fractured. I couldn't do many things on my own, yet you were always there. You helped me without complaining, looked after me with so much care, and made sure I never felt alone. I don't know if I thanked you enough back then, but today I want you to know that I'll always be grateful for everything you did for me.

title: Thank You for Never Giving Up on Me 💕
author: Your Brother
message: Whenever I get angry or upset, I sometimes push everyone away. But you never stop trying. Even when we fight, you're always the one who comes back first and says, 'Okay bro... let's sort it out.' That simple habit of yours has saved our bond so many times. Thank you for choosing our relationship over your ego.

title: That Birthday I Can Never Forget 🎂
author: Your Brother
message: On Mom's birthday, I was being stubborn and refused to come for the cake cutting. Everyone tried to convince me, but it was you who came again and again until I finally agreed. You rarely insist on anything, yet that day you didn't give up. Looking back, I realize how much you cared, even when I wasn't making it easy.

title: Growing Up With You 🌸
author: Your Brother
message: We've fought over silly things, laughed until our stomachs hurt, taken countless selfies, teased each other every single day, and shared memories that no one else will ever understand. If someone asked me what my childhood looked like, I'd simply show them pictures of us.

title: One Promise 🤝
author: Your Brother
message: Life will keep changing. We'll get older, become busier, and maybe live in different places someday. But one thing should never change—our bond. No matter what happens, you'll always have one annoying little brother who'll stand beside you whenever you need him.
